title: Terra Curio
description: Some intersting Accessories reproduced from from Terraria
body:
# Terra Curio

## The accessories part of "Confluence of Afterlife"

Accessories are equipable items that can provide stat boosts and/or special abilities, such as limited flight.

Accessories must be placed in a character's equip accessory slots to work, with the exception of some informational accessories which work simply by being in a character's inventory.

## This mod has been reproduced with 150+ accessories so far and will be improved in the future

Such as Gravity Globe, which allows the holder to flip gravity, so that the player falls up instead of down, and toggle gravity back to normal afterward. Once equipped, pressing the jump key toggles the gravity direction. This only affects the player with the item equipped.
![Flip gravity](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/879/112/2024-05-31_11.png)
